meaning: n.游艇驾驶者,游艇所有者
examples: A yachtsman got into trouble off the coast and had to be rescued.
He drew on his experience as a yachtsman to make a documentary programme.
The rescue services did the last sweep to try and find the missing yachtsman.
His mother, Beverly, added that his experience as a yachtsman would help him cope.
They were joined by the solo yachtsman , who knows a thing or two about trouble at sea.
